title: Pearl Awards Unveils Central Working Committee for 30th Anniversary Celebration - FinancialEDGE
description: The Pearl Awards Nigeria has inaugurated its Central Working Committee (CWC) to drive strategic initiatives and programs for its 30th anniversary celebration and 2025 edition. President of Pearl Award, Tayo Orekoya emphasized the significance of early preparation, stating, "We want to make our 30th anniversary a memorable one, and hosting the Awards next year will
html: The Pearl Awards Nigeria has inaugurated its Central Working Committee (CWC) to drive strategic initiatives and programs for its 30th anniversary celebration and 2025 edition.
